_comment_file: configuration values used by the exercise 13 smart home controller
_comment_temperature_threshold: maximum comfortable temperature used by the automation rule
_comment_alert_temperature_threshold: temperature limit used to publish an alert message
_comment_stats_window_size: number of recent temperature values kept  for rolling statistics
_comment_default_room: room used when the controller cannot understand the room from the message
_comment_default_motion: initial motion state used before the first motion event is received
_comment_alert_topic_base: base topic where the controller publishes temperature alerts
_comment_fallback_led_command_topic: default LED topic used if no Arduino topic is discovered in the catalog
_comment_registration_refresh_seconds: how often the controller refreshes its service registration
_comment_catalog_poll_seconds: how often the controller checks the catalog  for new devices and topics
